/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -fPIC  -O3 -march=native -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-label  -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/dacestub_graupel_run.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libdacestub_graupel_run.so -o libdacestub_graupel_run.so CMakeFiles/dacestub_graupel_run.dir/tools/dacestub.cpp.o  -ldl /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
